full_text:
Zhang Quan 張泉
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Zhang Quan (張泉)was born in Wuwei. Took part in Wei Fang’s plot and executed when caught. Family lost marquis. Zhang Quan was affiliated with the Wei Kingdom. Zhang Quan lived during the Later Han Dynasty periods of Chinese history.
